name: Full questionnaire flow from landing to thank you page

statusDetails.message:
Element should have attribute data-autotest-js-ready {body}
Element: '<body class="bg-deepBlue05 g5n0RB5VSMnoyo4c5wzz">Thank you Andrew, your contractor QA company will call soon!
Please don't miss the call or the contractor won't be able to provide a free estimate!
No-Obligation Appointment
The contractor will start your free estimate by taking measurements, examining layout and bringing materials for you to look at.
You’re In Control!
There is no obligation at this point, it’s up to you if you want to move forward.</body>'
